title: BP shares fall 5% after oil major suspends share buyback plan
summary: BP on Tuesday posted fourth-quarter profit in line with expectations, after crude prices dipped below $60 a barrel for the first time in nearly five years.

title: Italian olive oil farmers say flood of imports is causing price collapse
summary: Cheaper supplies from Tunisia are forcing producers to sell at a loss, industry group says
